title: Write article: AI tools in my development workflow - Q1 2026
description:
Article covering the progression and experience of using AI tools in software development throughout Q1 2026.

Topics to cover:
- Claude Code as primary tool
- Gemini CLI usage
- Shift toward working more in the terminal
- Switching to Tabby as a new terminal emulator
- Increased use of tmux
- Running multiple Claude Code sessions in parallel
- Trying out Kintsugi
- Building a custom Claude Code radar app for observability
- Using VS Code mainly to look at data rather than write code
- Claude Code skills (prompting, context management, workflows)
- Context management strategies
- Getting started with Beads issue tracker
- Reading GasTown and other articles by Steve Yegge

More topics will likely be added when writing begins.
